steps.title: Track the added action
steps.content: The passage presents two separate actions that show Rivera fighting injustice: supporting the revolt as a reporter and founding the League of Mexican Women.

steps.title: Reject the wrong links
steps.content: Choice B signals a summary, but the sentence adds a new action. Choice C makes the founding an example of the reporting work, which it is not. Choice D signals contrast, but both actions support the same idea.

steps.title: Choose addition
steps.content: Additionally shows that founding the League was another historic action Rivera took against injustice. The answer is A.
